title: Medical Practice Review Management: HIPAA-Compliant Guide for Clinics
titleZh: 醫療診所評論管理：符合 HIPAA 規範的指南

metaDescription: A HIPAA-compliant guide to managing clinic Google reviews. Learn how to ethically collect healthcare reviews, respond to patient feedback, and improve your medical practice's online reputation.
